note: The catalogue database. tools/build-catalogue.mjs scans assets/audio/*.mp3 and emits data/catalogue.json for whatever files are actually present — durations measured from the files. Add a song here and drop its mp3 in assets/audio/ and it appears in the catalogue automatically. A file present with no entry here still shows, with a title derived from its filename. 'soon: true' lists a known track before its mp3 lands. 'catalogue: false' keeps a file out of the QT6KV catalogue (e.g. release-only cuts by other artists).
